title: polypodium lycopodioides var. mackenii
intro: Polypodium lycopodioides var. mackenii, also known as the Polypodium fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium lycopodioides var. mackenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent, which can help to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
